{{Infobox starship
| name = The Last Horizon
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[The Last Horizon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Last [[Horizon]] is a legendary [[Zenith Era]] starship, often categorized as a [[Zenith Device]]. While many consider it a myth, scholars and technicians believe it is one of the few such artifacts to have survived into the modern era. The vessel is described as a light cruiser, measuring between four hundred and five hundred yards in length, with an organic appearance that suggests it was grown rather than manufactured. Its dark metal hull is shaped like a predatory bird in flight, featuring smooth plates that glow with various colors at the seams or joints depending on its state. The interior of the ship is noted for its impossible perfection, lacking the typical wear or imperfections found on standard vessels. As a singular [[Zenith Device]], the ship is rumored to be imbued with enchantments from an astral [[dragon]], three [[World Spirits]], and several [[Archmagi]]. Its legendary capabilities are vast and sometimes contradictory, including the power to terraform entire systems in weeks, [[construct]] colonies or entire fleets in moments, and transport crew across the galaxy without using [[Subspace]]. It is also said to be able to freeze planetary motion, conjure copies of itself from the [[Aether]], and pierce planets with single shots. In combat, it possesses [[Aethertech]] weaponry comparable to massive dreadnoughts despite its compact size. The ship is a polarizing figure in galactic lore; some view it as a herald of disaster or a terror to the [[Free Worlds]], while others recognize it as an exemplar of starship engineering. It operates with a specialized crew, including a [[Captain]] and an [[Engineer]], and possesses advanced simulation capacities. Although it has faced significant damage in past conflicts—at times reverting to a state of non-functionality during repairs—it remains a formidable force capable of engaging massive fleets.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Last [[Horizon]] is a legendary [[Aethertech]] light cruiser, also known as the Chariot of the [[Star]]-Queens, which enabled early humanity's colonization of the stars. This golden vessel, resembling a winged [[pyramid]] with smooth metal plates shaped like a diving bird of prey, is rumored to possess immense powers such as terraforming systems, conjuring copies of itself, and piercing planets. As a [[Zenith Device]] with its own ship's spirit named [[Horizon]], the vessel functions through a symbiotic relationship with a crew of six and requires a [[Captain]] to operate fully. Though it has been used to transport [[Raion]] to the iron mountain and produce an armada's worth of weapons, the ship was severely damaged during a battle against the [[Iron King]]. Ultimately, this starship that can travel through [[Subspace]] and teleport its occupants remains a vessel of heroes that chooses courage over intelligence.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">62</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is the original [[Aethertech]] starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is said to have enabled early humanity's colonization of the stars.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is rumored to be able to transport crew members across the galaxy without passing through [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is rumored to be able to conjure copies of itself from the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is rumored to be able to pierce through planets in a single shot.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is rumored to be able to freeze the motion of planetary bodies.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is rumored to be able to [[construct]] entire colonies in seconds.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is rumored to be able to terraform systems in a matter of weeks.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] may be connected to the cloudy orange planet.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a light cruiser that is at least four hundred yards long.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]]'s hull plates are smooth metal shaped like a diving bird of prey.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]]'s power is derived from its crew.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9">''The Captain'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] requires a [[Captain]] to function fully.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] can teleport its occupants.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]]'s bridge is made of organic metal.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] has a shield stability readout.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] has a hangar with virtually indestructible metal doors.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a vessel that can be competed for control of.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is supposedly a single [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is also known as the Chariot of the [[Star]]-Queens.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that can be competed for in a virtual competition.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is described as the ship of heroes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is an entity that does not acknowledge Shyrax.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a giant starship with a golden surface that resembles a winged [[pyramid]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] has a ship's spirit.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with a crew and a [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15">''The Captain'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship/fellowship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] brought [[Raion]] to the iron mountain.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] utilizes a [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a legendary starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] contains stone tablets illustrating its six crew members.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The crew has not yet tested the weapons of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a secret event.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Captain]] is the leader of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] aims to please regardless of objectives.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24">''The Captain'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship with teleportation capabilities.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship under the protagonist's control.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] contains a containment room on its lower decks.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c26">''The Captain'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that left the planet.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] accepts only six crew members with whom it has a symbiotic relationship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|When the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]] dies, the ship goes dormant.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri]] looked down on [[The Last Horizon]] from a thousand perspectives.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with a spirit and smooth halls.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29">''The Captain'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that has grown turrets after accepting [[Sola]] as its [[Sword]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that an [[Iron King]] might try to take.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship located an hour away.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship capable of carving through the [[Iron Legion]] with uncountable guns and a storm of light.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c34">''The Captain'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship that can travel through [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with a crimson shield.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that [[Union Intelligence]] believes [[Nelthan]]'s ships are capable of capturing.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37">''The Captain'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a vessel with a secure [[vault]] located at the far end from the bridge.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that was severely damaged in a battle against the [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with a spirit named [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a smooth cruiser that appeared from [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that produced an armada's worth of weapons.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship that emerged from [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43">''The Captain'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] can shift its floor to move seats at a user's direction.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] expanded his magic to claim [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] used [[Eurias]] to clash with [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]]'s deck was scraped clean by a circle of pink-and-orange fire.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] chooses for courage rather than intelligence.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] has a bridge.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Last [[Horizon]] is a dark metal starship with smooth plates that shine blue-green at the edges, intended to serve as Shyrax's flagship. This vessel, which utilizes hiding for protection rather than invisibility spells, functions as a group that recruits worthy heroes and judges abilities to determine superiority. The ship possesses mythical abilities such as terraforming, constructing fleets, and providing fabricator technology and schematics. While it features a wide, greenish metal personal weapons laboratory and various scanners and shuttles, the ship eventually becomes damaged after facing the full force of the [[Iron Legion]]. Despite being reduced to a pile of dead metal, the remaining crew of this rogue group came for their captain as the ship rose to face [[Starhammer]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">36</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that identifies itself to Shyrax's vessel.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is intended to be Shyrax's flagship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] judges abilities to determine superiority.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] provides fabricator technology.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c6">''The Engineer'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] provides fabricator schematics.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group with specific recruitment qualifications.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that [[Mell]] is traveling on.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax intends to keep [[The Last Horizon]] a rumor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that requires worthy heroes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18">''The Engineer'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator lives aboard [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] has a personal weapons laboratory.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]]'s personal weapons laboratory is a wide, open room of greenish metal with spaces for projects.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship that uses hiding for protection instead of an invisibility spell.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] possesses the mythical ability of constructing fleets.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] possesses the mythical ability of terraforming.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that the students wish to see.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that is dwarfed by the emptiness of the planet's crust.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a damaged ship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] faced down the full force of the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that stays close to the asteroid.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship commanded by [[Captain]] [[Varic Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is the narrator's group/ship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that unloads weapons systems on [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] possesses full power that can be used against [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a dark metal starship with smooth plates that shine blue-green at the edges.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c42">''The Engineer'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The crew of [[The Last Horizon]] is a rogue crew with no allegiances.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c42" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grave Hound]] went after [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] is the [[Knight of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship equipped with scanners.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that has shuttles.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The crew is aboard a frigate originally fabricated by [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is [[Mell]]'s affiliation.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that has reverted to a pile of dead metal.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The remaining crew of [[The Last Horizon]] came for their captain.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] rose to face [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54">''The Engineer'', chapter 54</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] has purple plates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Last [[Horizon]] is a massive starship at least five hundred yards long, constructed with [[Zenith Era alloys]] and shaped like a predatory bird in a dive. This vessel, which is commanded by [[Varic]] and features firepower surpassing that of the [[Divine Titans]], prints organic-looking ships covered in dark metal plates. As a group associated with the hero [[Horizon]] and the source of memory manifestation magic, it includes [[Raion Raithe]], a [[Knight]] who represents the entity in duels. During its journey through [[Alliance space]], the ship was surrounded by [[Visiri]] vessels and targeted by a trap, causing its hallways to tremble from the impact of hits. The ship serves as a location for Shyrax's duties and contains specialized facilities, such as a medical room utilizing healing magic and [[Aethertech]] to treat many patients in a small space.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">35</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] prints smooth, organic-looking ships covered in dark metal plates that shine blue-green at the seams.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a vessel where Shyrax will attend to her duties.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group of which [[Raion Raithe]] is a [[Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6">''The Knight'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship captained by the narrator with firepower surpassing that of the [[Divine Titans]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that includes [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A shuttle was borrowed from [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that people would love to have a connection to.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] has full power.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that fabricated a long-range cruiser.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a location where [[Starhammer]] is held.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax reappears on the bridge of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mell]] contacted [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship at least five hundred yards long shaped like a predatory bird in a dive.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with a hallway that can tremble.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group or entity associated with the hero [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is the source of memory manifestation magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] represents [[The Last Horizon]] in the duel.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group or vessel commanded by [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The medical room of [[The Last Horizon]] is small but uses healing magic and medical [[Aethertech]] to handle many patients in limited space.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c32">''The Knight'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a blue-green triangle on the holographic depiction of the [[Visiria system]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship equipped with magic amplification systems.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] was the target of a trap.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that entered [[Alliance space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship being surrounded by [[Visiri]] ships.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship constructed with [[Zenith Era alloys]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] was shaking from taking hits.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that provides firepower.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that can be connected to entities by a green blade of endless length.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that [[Titan Knights]] might work with.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that the [[Blue Titan]] attempted to call.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] performs the roles of the [[Yellow Knight]], [[White Knight]], and [[Green Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with a bridge where the pilot reappeared.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship [[Raion]] expects Shyrax to return to.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] has a [[Pilot]] aboard.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that provides spotlight for the Corporation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Last [[Horizon]] is a starship and group known for saving battle victims during the [[Visiria]] relief effort, though opinions regarding them vary. This vessel, which features a bridge where the narrator sits and houses mages in its depths, has engaged in attacking and defending planets against the [[D’Niss]]. While [[Solstice]] seeks to form an alliance with them, the ship has been prevented from following [[Benri]] by both [[Solstice]] and the [[Zenith Processor]]. The crew faces widespread opposition as enemies of the [[Vallenar Corporation]] and the [[Galactic Union]], even as they embark on a dangerous quest involving non-standard, planet-scorching weaponry. Currently engaged in orbital combat, the ship is equipped with a [[Subspace Drive]] and can be used for extractions or emergency teleportation.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">37</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that people have varying opinions about in the [[Visiria]] relief effort.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that helped save victims of a battle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that has been attacking planets and defending them from the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship that appears as a hologram in the meeting.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with a bridge where the narrator sits.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is currently on a dangerous quest.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] glows green with blazing weapons.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship that fabricates ships in a specific style.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship that provides protection for systems.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that [[Solstice]] wants to have as an ally.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] was prevented from following [[Benri]] by [[Solstice]] and the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] possesses non-standard weaponry.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] intends to attempt to persuade [[The Last Horizon]] to join them.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is within range of [[Fathom]]'s planetary defenses.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] has put a target lock on the Galaxy’s [[Capital]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] chased a [[Union]] cargo ship out of [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mages are located in the depths of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group that [[Visiria]] might consider befriending.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] fought for [[Visiria]] during the battle against the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The volunteers would face a true battle against [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] possesses planet-scorching weaponry.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship used by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator is furious with [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The wizards aboard [[Horizon]] benefited from time spent on [[The Last Horizon]] examining a [[Zenith Device]] and its magical records.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31">''The Pilot'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is an entity [[Benri Vallenar]] maintains a connection to.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The crew of [[The Last Horizon]] are enemies of the [[Galactic Union]] and the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The crew of [[The Last Horizon]] faced widespread opposition across the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is currently refueling by stealing fuel from an abandoned freighter.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is an entity that [[Lutoch Terelle]] and [[Void Prism]] could potentially take on.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a group capable of bombarding the [[Research Center]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship that can be called for extraction.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship currently in battle in orbit.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax can call for emergency teleportation from [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a ship with an internal camera.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] successfully arrived aboard [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is equipped with a [[Subspace Drive]] and sub-light engines.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a starship with weapons systems.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|"The Zenith Starship, known by its ID The Last Horizon, is the original Aethertech—"<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|"It is said that colonization of the stars by early humanity was only possible thanks to the creation of The Last Horizon."<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|I remembered the impenetrable metal doors. “Can we hide in there?” 
“It’s virtually indestructible.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|the ship’s spirit said, “congratulations are in order,” to my new Captain and the first member of our crew.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“We’re being hailed, Your Highness! The ship identifies itself as The Last Horizon.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
